content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：畸变丰穰之种 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：畸变丰穰之种
旧日的女王，被遗忘的女王，她依然在无边孤寂中等待。
等待着她的血与种，被带向湮灭后的新世界。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: Seed of Grotesque Abundance was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST: Seed of Grotesque Abundance
The queen of old, the forgotten queen, she waits still in boundless solitude. She waits for her blood and seed to be carried toward a new world, after annihilation.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：畸变丰穰之种
